attributes.action: Stop the use of UK bases for the US to launch strikes in the Iranian war
attributes.additional_details:
We must not be drawn into another escalating conflict that is not ours to fight. Allowing UK bases to be used for strikes on Iran risks entangling Britain in a dangerous war, with consequences for global stability and our national integrity.

We have learned from past mistakes. Britain must stand for restraint, independence, and diplomacy.

Sign this petition to demand Britain chooses peace over war.

Act now.
attributes.background: Do not allow the US to launch strikes from UK bases

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
